Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how effective drop shotting can be for largemouth bass when the bass are keying in on bedding bluegills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Jiggin' & Drop Shottin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson head to Eagle Lake in Sunset Country to cast for big muskies during the summer to fall transition
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Giant Eagle Lake Muskies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Alabama Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Monticello
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: 'Pitching' for bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker: High School Bassin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Hartwell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Venice Reds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake Chatuge's spotted bass are schooling throughout the open water and Kim capitalizes on the rising fish with a Strike King "Sexy Dawg". When the surface activity slows, he switches to a small Rage Swimmer swimbait to better match the forage size.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Back to School
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Pitching and flipping are effective methods to catch Bass in shallow waters, undercover trees, and grass. Shea heads out solo skiff fishing for Bass in Lake Perris. He explains his techniques and tests out a topwater frog lure at dusk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Flipping and Pitching Lake Perris, CA, Part One
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest FLW Pro Cody Meyer are on Clear Lake battling the rocks for the bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — Rocky Fish
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Through her 36 years in the Army as a nurse and medic, Laura Ludwig faced many challenges. None more difficult than taking care of the young men and women who served in Iraq and Afghanistan. Since coming home Laura has not stopped serving.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Nurse Laura Ludwig
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim probes reed islands and lily pads in search of mid-winter, Florida-strain bucketmouths. Seaguar's "Flippin Braid" stands up to the challenge while Strike King's 4" "Rodent" is the featured lure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Pig Island
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This weeks episode we do somethingi've never done before. we ice fish lake trout but we can see about 30 feet down through the clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Giant Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On 9/11/2001, Bryan Anderson started basic training with the U.S. Army. A few months later he would find himself in the middle of the Iraq War as a military police officer. An IED Explosion would change his life forever, and Bryan would begin his new life as a triple amputee.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Veteran Bryan Anderson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're heading over to the Detroit river this week to hook up with our good friend Jason Julien from Church Tackle. We'll be teaching the in's and out's of using his excellent boards to catch some walleye!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Detroit River Trolling
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Seaguar Assistant Marketing Manager, Brian Evans acquires a lesson in light refraction while sight fishing the smallie-rich flats of Lake St. Clair. Kim provides some guidence from the lake bottoms while conversing with Brian topside.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Look at that Fish!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace use Humminbird Mega LIVE to pinpoint and dropshot up some Minnesota gold.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Mega LIVE Dropshot Walleyes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: U.S. Marine James Turner signed up to serve at just 13 years old. Inspired by the events of 9-11, this Marine faced his toughest battle after returning home. Host Ben Olsen leads him to Minnesota bass as James tells his story.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran James Turner
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us for this episode where one of our local anglers, catches a personal best Walleye
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Personal Best
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 2
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Northern Wilderness Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains where to find bass under bluebird skies
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Bluebird Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is bass fishing on sugar Lake in Mexico with Pedro Sores
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Fishing with Pedro
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is bass fishing in his kayak then he will be crappie fishing in Oklahoma
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Kayak Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks guiding, tournament fishing and Forward Facing Sonar FACTS with Captain Spencer Clark.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Spencer Clark
Video.title: Episode 1
